items.title: Microsoft error sees confidential emails exposed to AI tool Copilot
items.summary: The company says it has addressed the issue and it did not provide anyone access to information they weren't already authorised to see.

items.title: Study shows how rocket launches pollute the atmosphere
items.summary: Is the global atmospheric commons destined to be an industrial waste dumping ground?

items.title: Move over, Apple: Meet the alternative app stores available in the EU
items.summary: A list of some of the alternative app stores iPhone users in the EU can try today.

items.title: NASA says it needs to haul the Artemis II rocket back to the hangar for repairs
items.summary: Accessing and remediating any of these issues can only be performed in the VAB.

items.title: Sam Altman would like remind you that humans use a lot of energy, too
items.summary: It also takes a lot of energy to train a human.

items.title: Wikipedia blacklists Archive.today after alleged DDoS attack
items.summary: Wikipedia editors have decided to remove all links to Archive.today, a web archiving service that they said has been linked to more than 695,000 times across the online encyclopedia.

items.title: Microsoft's new gaming CEO vows not to flood the ecosystem with 'endless AI slop'
items.summary: Is Microsoft's gaming division doubling down on AI?

items.title: Google VP warns that two types of AI startups may not survive
items.summary: As generative AI evolves, a Google VP warns that LLM wrappers and AI aggregators face mounting pressure, with shrinking margins and limited differentiation threatening their long-term viability.

items.title: OpenAI debated calling police about suspected Canadian shooter's chats
items.summary: Jesse Van Rootselaar's descriptions of gun violence were flagged by tools that monitor ChatGPT for misuse.

items.title: India's Sarvam launches Indus AI chat app as competition heats up
items.summary: Sarvam's Indus chat app is currently available in beta.

items.title: Georgia says Elon Musk's America PAC violated election law
items.summary: For all his bluster about voter fraud, Elon Musk has been one of the most flagrant flaunters of US election law. Now his America PAC has been slapped with a reprimand by the Georgia State Election Board.

items.title: Urgent research needed to tackle AI threats, says Google AI boss
items.summary: But the head of the US delegation at the AI Impact Summit in Delhi says: We totally reject global governance of AI.
